sections.sectionTitle: Israel Mi A Cingte' Siatna Ding Genkholhna

verses.text: Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a

“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, keima tuuhon ahi Israel mi a cingte mawhsakna thu gen in. Amaute kiangah thu gen in la, Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen, amaute kiangah hih bangin gen in: Israel mi a cing note aw, gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Nomau mahmah na kivak uh a, tuute na don kei uh hi
Tuunawi ne-in, tuumul silhin, tuu thaute go-in a sa na ne uh hi. Ahi zongin tuute na vak kei uh hi

Tuu zawngkhalte na khoi kei uh a, a cinate damsak loin, a liamnate na tuamsak kei uh hi. A lampialte na khiang kei uh a, a mangte na zong kei uh hi. Tua bang bek hiloin, ngong bawlin na ukgawp zawsop uh hi
Tua tuute in a cing ding neilo uh ahih manin kithehthang gawp uh a, gamsate' an a suak lel uh hi

Tua ahih manin ka tuute kithehthang gawp uh a, mualtungte leh mual sang tung khempeuhah vakmang uh hi. Leitung gam khempeuhah ka tuute kithehthang uh a, kuamah in zon' ding kan dingin ngaihsunlo uh hi
“Tua ahih manin no tuucingte aw, Topa ahi keima thugen ngai un

Kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih takpi mah bangin, keima thu nong ngaihzawk ding uh hinapi-in, tu-in a cing omlo ahih manin gamsate in ka tuute manin thatin a ne uh hi. Ka tuu a cingte in a tuu uh zonglo uh a, amau pumpi bek mah kivakin ka tuute vaklo uh hi
Tua ahih manin no tuucingte aw, keima thugen ngai un

Topa Pasian ahi keimah, note' lang ka hihna thu tu-in kong pulak hi. Note' khutsung panin ka tuute ka la ding a, tuute donloin note bek a kidon no tuucingte' khutsungah ka tuute ka omsakkik nawn kei ding hi. Note' khutsung panin ka tuute ka honkhia ding a, ka tuute, note' nekin ka omsak nawn kei ding hi
“Topa Pasian keimah in note kiangah kong genin-ah: Keimahmah in ka tuute zongin ka kem ding hi
Tuucingte in a kithehthang tuute kaikhawmin a kep bangin keimah in donin ka kem ding hi. Tua bang a lauhuai siatna ding hun laitakin a kithehthangna uh mun khempeuh panin ka kaikhawm ding hi
Gamdang panin amaute lakhia-in ka kaikhawm ding a, amaute' leitangah ka tun'pihkik ding hi. Israel mualtungte, lui geite, leh mite' ten'na mun khempeuhah amaute ka gamtasak ding hi
Lungmuang takin Israel mualtung lonona leh guamsung munnuamte leh Israel gam lonona mun khempeuhah ka gamtasak ding hi
Keimahmah in ka tuute ka cing ding a, nuamtakin a omna ding uh mun ka zon'sak ding hi. Topa Pasian keimah in hih thu ka gen khin hi

Keimah in a mangte zongin, a lampialte kaikhawmin, a liamte a liamma tuamsakin, a cinate damsakin, a cidam a thahatte zong a kibangin ka en ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen a manin a gamta tuucingpa ka hi hi
“No ka tuuhonte aw, Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen ngai un: Note a tuamtuam ciatin thu kong khen ding a, note sung panin a hoih leh a hoihlo hong khenin, tuu leh keel zong kong khen ding hi
Note pawlkhat, lopa limci na nek bek uh tawh na lungkim kei uh a, na neklohte nangawn uh na tuancilgawp uh hi. Tui a siang na dawn uh a, na dawnlohteng uh na siknin uh hi
Ka tuu dangte in na tuatcilsa uh lopa ne-in na sikninsa uh tuite a dawn uh kul hi
“Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian keimah in ka thugen ngai un: No tuu thaute leh tuu gawngte kong khen ding hi
Note in a cidamlote na ki uh tawh si gawpin, a hon lak panin na nawtkhia uh hi
Keimah in ka tuuhonte ka hon ding a, a dangte ka bawlsiasak nawn kei ding hi. Ka tuute khatlekhat kikalah thu ka khen ding hi
Amaute a cing dingin ka nasempa David ka koih ding a, amah in amaute hoihtakin an vakin a kem ding hi
Topa ahi keimah, amaute' Pasian ka hi ding a, ka nasempa David, amaute a ukpa hi ding hi. Topa ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khin hi
Amaute lungmuang takin a om theihna dingun amaute tawh thuciamna khat ka bawl ding hi. Gamsung panin a lauhuai gamsa khempeuh ka beisak ding a, gamlakah nuamtakin gamta-in a lum thei ding uh hi
“Amaute thupha pia-in ka mual siangtho kiimah ka omsak ding hi. A kisap hunhunin thupha guahtui ka zusak ding hi

Singkungte tampi tak gahin, lo-ah an tampi piang ding a, mi khempeuh a leitang ciat uhah nuamtakin teng ding uh hi. Sal ahihna panun ka mite suakta sakin, a kikhihna kolte uh ka sutsak khit ciangin, Topa ka hihna thu amaute in hong thei ding uh hi
Gamdang mite in hih gawpgawp nawnlo ding uh a, gamsate in thatin ne nawnlo ding uh hi. Amaute lungmuang takin om ding uh a, kuamah in lausak nawnlo ding uh hi
Amaute tungah logam hoih pia ding ka hih manin gamsungah gilkial dangtak om nawnlo ding hi. Minam dangte in amaute simmawhbawl nawnlo ding uh hi
Israel mite ka hutna leh amaute pen keima mi ahihna thu mi khempeuh in thei ding uh hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu ka gen khin hi
“No ka ta ahi tuute aw, an ka hong vak tuuhon ahi keima mite na hi uh a, kei pen note' Pasian ka hi hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih thu kong gen khin hi,” hong ci hi.
